name: Brian Simpson
bio: Brian Simpson is an American stand-up comedian and podcaster who grew up in foster care and served in the United States Marine Corps before pursuing comedy. He became a regular at the Comedy Store in Los Angeles and is known for his deadpan, unfiltered style. His debut hour, Live from the Mothership, premiered on Netflix in 2024.

timeline.ev: Selected as a New Face at the Just For Laughs festival
Named one of Varietys 10 Comics to Watch
Netflix special Live from the Mothership premieres
